title: Very Small Swords
description: Very small swords, for more visibility and to get better at pvp instantly.
body:
# Very Small Swords
Very Small Swords is a resource pack that reduces the size of all sword textures, resulting in a cleaner screen and improved visibility during combat.
## Features
- Reduces the size of all sword textures
- Improves on-screen visibility
- Helps with more accurate hit timing
- Especially useful for PvP combat

## **Why use this pack?**
Large sword models can obstruct the player’s view during fights. By shrinking sword textures, this pack allows players to better track opponents and react more precisely.
